user_query: I'm organizing a company event and I need some interesting trivia to entertain the attendees. Can you provide me with a random fact? Also, I want to convert USD to JPY for budgeting purposes. Furthermore, find me a playlist on Deezer to play during the event.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a random trivia fact to entertain attendees.
Convert USD to JPY for budgeting purposes.
Search for a fun playlist on Deezer for the event.
